name: Silence Check
description: Ask whether a specific proposed action should be silenced by the Silence Protocol. Returns a boolean + failing planes. Use before any high-stakes action to prevent the agent from acting on incomplete information.
author: SOVEREIGN-Ω

proposed_action.description: Description of the action to evaluate for silencing

stakes.description: How high are the stakes? Higher stakes → stricter silence gate

silenced.description: true = do NOT proceed with action
